recommendations.title: I Am Not an Easy Man
recommendations.overview: The chauvinist Damien wakes up in a world where women and men have their roles reversed in society, and everything is dominated by women.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Marguerite
recommendations.overview: Paris in the 1920s. Marguerite Dumont is a wealthy woman with a passion for music and the opera. For years, she has performed regularly for a circle of guests. But Marguerite sings tragically out of tune and no one has ever told her. Her husband and

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: Romeo Is Bleeding
recommendations.overview: A corrupt cop gets in over his head when he tries to assassinate a beautiful Russian hit-woman.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall

recommendations.title: Symbol
recommendations.overview: A Japanese man in polka-dot pajamas wakes up in a room with no doors. Meanwhile, a middle-aged Mexican wrestler prepares for his most challenging match ever.

recommendations.title: Tel Aviv on Fire
